title: Fix scope-override parser Reason/Paths order + findOwnManifest trap (with P1 continuation-binding correction)

sha_binding.verified_source_note: PR head SHA (1bebb8ad) at merge time; verified_source_sha bound to the merge SHA after squash-merge.

new_tests: scope-override-comment-parser.test.ts: parses a well-formed override with Reason before Paths
scope-override-comment-parser.test.ts: parses a well-formed override with Reason after Paths (schema doc documented order)
scope-override-comment-parser.test.ts: rejects a comment missing the two-line header
scope-override-comment-parser.test.ts: rejects a comment with no Paths
scope-override-comment-parser.test.ts: rejects a comment with a malformed Issue field
file-scope-guard.test.ts: own manifest resolution: exact branch match still passes with no override needed
file-scope-guard.test.ts: own manifest resolution (UTV2-1524 P1 correction): a same-issue continuation with NO authorization fails closed
file-scope-guard.test.ts: own manifest resolution (UTV2-1524 P1 correction): an unrelated branch containing the same issue ID cannot inherit the manifest scope, and cannot bypass conflict detection
file-scope-guard.test.ts: own manifest resolution (UTV2-1524 P1 correction): a properly authorized, PR-number-bound and head-SHA-bound continuation succeeds
file-scope-guard.test.ts: own manifest resolution (UTV2-1524 P1 correction): a stale continuation override (head SHA no longer matches) fails closed
file-scope-guard.test.ts: own manifest resolution (UTV2-1524 P1 correction): a wrong-PR continuation override fails closed
file-scope-guard.test.ts: own manifest resolution (UTV2-1524 P1 correction): a wrong-issue continuation override does not authorize a different lane's branch
file-scope-guard.test.ts: own manifest resolution (UTV2-1524 P1 correction): a valid continuation override does not authorize paths beyond its declared scope
file-scope-guard.test.ts: resolveApplicableOverride: when two comments match the same head SHA, the later one wins

receipts.note: CI-tooling-only change (comment parser + manifest-resolution logic); test:db run as the standard T1 runtime-proof gate, not because this fix performs any DB write itself. Re-run clean (7/7) after the P1 correction; an earlier same-session run showed 1 transient failure consistent with known live-Supabase flakiness.

queries: database repository bundle persists a submission and settlement when Supabase is configured
UTV2-920: invalid atomic enqueue writes no lifecycle event or outbox row
UTV2-920: invalid atomic delivery confirmation rolls back outbox status, receipt, lifecycle, and audit writes
UTV2-920: invalid atomic settlement writes no settlement, lifecycle event, or audit row
UTV2-883: no duplicate participants for the same external_id and sport
UTV2-996: re-settling a settled pick creates correction — no true duplicate base rows
UTV2-996: correction chain is additive — original settlement row is not mutated

row_counts.note: This is a CI-tooling-only change (comment parser + manifest-resolution logic); no lane-specific DB rows are mutated by it. test:db exercises the standard smoke suite's monitored tables as the T1 runtime-proof gate.
